name: Faias Trail (PR 13) — Serra da Estrela
region_intro: Easy hiking trails around Manteigas (Santa Maria) are situated within the Serra da Estrela Natural Park, characterized by the prominent Zêzere Glacial Valley. This region features steep granitic slopes, winding rivers, and diverse forest areas, including a notable beech forest. The landscape offers a mix of open pastures, rocky formations, and glacial lakes, providing varied terrain for hikers. Best easy hiking trails around Manteigas (Santa Maria) The most popular easy hiking route is Faias Trail (PR 13) — Serra da Estrela, a 3.7 miles (5.9 km) trail that takes 1 hour 59 minutes to complete. This route leads through the Faias Wood, known for its beech trees. Another top favourite among local hikers is Vale do Rossim Reservoir loop from Casa das Penhas Douradas Tesla Destination Charger, an easy 4.0 miles (6.4 km) path. This loop offers views of the Vale do Rossim Reservoir and surrounding natural areas. Local hikers also love the Vale do Rossim Reservoir loop from Vale do Rossim, a 3.0 miles (4.8 km) trail leading through the reservoir area, often completed in about 1 hour 20 minutes. Hiking around Manteigas (Santa Maria) is defined by the U-shaped Zêzere Glacial Valley, striking granitic rock formations, and extensive beech forests. The network offers options for various ability levels, including many easy hiking trails. The routes in Manteigas (Santa Maria) are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.4 stars from over 240 reviews. More than 1,000 hikers have used komoot to explore Manteigas (Santa Maria)'s varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many easy hiking trails are available around Manteigas (Santa Maria)?
A: There are &lt;strong&gt;19 easy hiking trails&lt;/strong&gt; around Manteigas (Santa Maria) listed on komoot. In total, the region offers 58 hiking routes across various difficulty levels.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on easy hikes in Manteigas (Santa Maria)?
A: Easy hikes in Manteigas (Santa Maria) typically feature varied terrain, including paths through the prominent Zêzere Glacial Valley with its U-shaped profile, sections with granitic slopes, and verdant pastures. You'll also find trails winding through diverse forest areas, such as the notable beech forest, and around glacial lakes.

Q: What makes the hiking around Manteigas (Santa Maria) unique?
A: The hiking experience in Manteigas is unique due to its setting within the Serra da Estrela Natural Park, particularly the remarkable Zêzere Glacial Valley. This area showcases well-preserved geomorphological traces from the last ice age, featuring striking granitic rock formations like the Cântaros and picturesque spots such as Covão D'Ametade, framed by birch trees.

Q: Are there any easy trails that feature waterfalls?
A: Yes, you can find easy trails that lead to waterfalls. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/6019826" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Hidden cascade at Poço do Inferno&lt;/a&gt; is a beautiful waterfall located in a steep gorge, offering a captivating sight, especially in spring. While the specific 'Inferno Well Route (PR1 MTG)' is mentioned in region research, it's not explicitly listed as an easy komoot route in the provided data, but the highlight itself is accessible.

Q: Can I find easy hikes that pass by lakes or reservoirs?
A: Absolutely. Several easy routes offer views of water bodies. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/17313385" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Vale do Rossim Reservoir loop from Casa das Penhas Douradas Tesla Destination Charger&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/19431955" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Vale do Rossim Reservoir loop from Vale do Rossim&lt;/a&gt; both provide scenic paths around the Vale do Rossim Reservoir. The region also features other glacial lagoons like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4915608" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Long Lake&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there easy routes through forests in the Manteigas area?
A: Yes, the region is known for its forests. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e2144286762/faias-trail-pr-13-serra-da-estrela" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Faias Trail (PR 13) — Serra da Estrela&lt;/a&gt; is a popular easy route that leads directly through the Faias Wood, a large and unusual beech forest for Portugal, particularly beautiful in autumn.

Q: What do other hikers enjoy most about easy trails in Manteigas (Santa Maria)?
A: The easy trails in Manteigas (Santa Maria) are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of &lt;strong&gt;4.4 stars from over 240 reviews&lt;/strong&gt;. Hikers often praise the stunning natural beauty, the well-preserved glacial landscapes, and the peaceful atmosphere of routes like those through the Faias Wood or around the reservoirs.

Q: Are there family-friendly easy hiking options in Manteigas (Santa Maria)?
A: Many of the easy trails in Manteigas (Santa Maria) are suitable for families, offering manageable distances and gentle elevation changes. Routes like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/19431955" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Vale do Rossim Reservoir loop from Vale do Rossim&lt;/a&gt;, at 4.8 km, are good options for a pleasant family outing.

Q: Are there any easy circular hiking routes available?
A: Yes, several easy circular routes are available. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/17313385" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Vale do Rossim Reservoir loop from Casa das Penhas Douradas Tesla Destination Charger&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/19431955" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Vale do Rossim Reservoir loop from Vale do Rossim&lt;/a&gt; are both excellent examples of easy loop trails, offering scenic views and convenient starting/ending points.

Q: What is the best time of year for easy hiking in Manteigas (Santa Maria)?
A: While hiking is possible year-round, spring offers lush landscapes and full waterfalls, while autumn transforms the Faias Wood into a vibrant orange spectacle. Summer provides warm, sunny days, and even severe winter days can offer a unique experience, with features like Poço do Inferno sometimes freezing over.

Q: Are there any viewpoints on the easy trails in Manteigas (Santa Maria)?
A: Yes, the region's dramatic landscape offers several viewpoints even on easy trails. You can find stunning vistas of the Zêzere Glacial Valley, such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4416223" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;View of the Zêzere Glacial Valley&lt;/a&gt;, providing panoramic perspectives of this unique natural feature.

Q: Are easy trails in Manteigas (Santa Maria) generally dog-friendly?
A: Many trails in the Serra da Estrela Natural Park, including easy routes around Manteigas, are generally dog-friendly. However, it's always advisable to keep dogs on a leash, especially in areas with livestock or protected wildlife, and to check specific trail regulations if available.

Q: Are there easy hikes that offer views of the Zêzere Glacial Valley?
A: Yes, the Zêzere Glacial Valley is a central feature of the region, and many trails offer views of it. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/21949310" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Start of the Beech Route – View of the Zêzere Valleys loop from Site of Community Importance Serra da Estrela&lt;/a&gt; is an easy route that specifically highlights views of the Zêzere Valleys.
tips: Right next to Capela de São Lourenço, there is a group of beautiful centuries'old oak trees that invite you to sit and enjoy their company and take in their majesty
Very accessible route, although practically unmarked.
A well-walked trail with beautiful scenery and views.
